_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in leading red team operations in support of mission and target requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.464), LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.455).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.522). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [leading, mission, operations, red, requirements, support] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.892, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (96.2%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in leading red team operations in support of mission and target requiremen" and "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.537 ≈ STS 0.522 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [leading, mission, operations, red, requirements, support]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 96.2% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
